calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-02-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
IGNACIO RIESCO, APPELLANT / DEFENDANT IN PRO PER
JULIE ALARCON, RESPONDENT / PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER

This case comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties ans witnesses are sworn.

Julie Alarcon testifies on behalf of Plaintiff / repsondent, herself. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1. Letter from Alarcon to Riesco, dated Nov. 13, 2013
Exhibit 2. Letter from Alarcon to Riesco, dated Nov. 21, 2013
Exhibit 3. Text dated 10/26
Exhibit 4. Receipts

Ignacio Riesco terstifies on behalf of defendant / appellant, himself.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported
